calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Rui Al Li was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Yun Qing Lei and ri Hong Lei.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
William Guan was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Angel Yun Qing Lei and Tim Ri Hong Lei.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
